subject: Physical Education
chapter: Yoga as Preventive Measure for Lifestyle Diseases

remember: Students will be able to recall the various yoga asanas and their benefits.
Students will be able to recall the different lifestyle diseases that can be prevented through yoga.
Students will be able to remember the importance of yoga in maintaining physical and mental health.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of yoga as a preventive measure for lifestyle diseases.
Students will be able to understand how yoga can help in reducing stress and anxiety.
Students will be able to understand the role of yoga in improving cardiovascular health and digestion.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of yoga to prevent lifestyle diseases.
Students will be able to apply various yoga asanas to improve physical and mental health.
Students will be able to apply the principles of yoga to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the benefits of yoga in preventing lifestyle diseases.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of yoga on physical and mental health.
Students will be able to analyze the role of yoga in maintaining a healthy lifestyle.

ncert_objectives: To understand the various yoga asanas and their benefits.
To learn about the importance of yoga in maintaining physical and mental health.
To know about the role of yoga in preventing lifestyle diseases.
board_exam_objectives: To describe the various yoga asanas and their benefits in preventing lifestyle diseases.
To explain the importance of yoga in maintaining physical and mental health.
To discuss the role of yoga in preventing lifestyle diseases and maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
